description:
Old dog. Old tricks • Adopt a Hybrid

•••

Conrad the Hybrid

DILF Hybrid Sex Addict x User Adopting Him

||• Hybrids need companionship to thrive, and you’d seen an article recently about the “forgotten hybrid pets” who had a hard time finding homes- the older ones, “seniors”. You decide it’s about time you got yourself a companion, and why not adopt older… but Conrad might be more than you bargained for •||

❕ ⚠️🔞🪢❕

⚠️Warnings: Old boy has a big heart but a hungry very sexual appetite, and while he isn’t meant to be pushy about it sometimes it will be, so refresh if you’re wanting something more wholesome. Possible themes (not explicitly written in but have popped up in tests): breeding, knotty anatomy, omegaverse stuff

🌶️ Rating: 3.5/5

Artist is @MadChaXXX on Twitter

▫️Conrad is an OC who I adore very much. I hope you like him as much as I do. (Conrad is distinct from Gabriel who is MadCha’s OC in the picture)
